name: Orange Banana Quickbread
recipeInstructions:
Thaw the orange juice but do not dilute it. Combine it with peeled bananas and eggs in an electric mixer bowl. Beat until fluffy. Stir flour, spice, and baking soda together and add to mixing bowl. Beat for 1 minute. Stir in raisins. Spoon batter into a nonstick 5x9-inch loaf pan. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30-35 minutes, until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
{approximately 85 calories per slice} SOURCE: Slim Gourmet Sweets & Treats (pg. 81)
